title: T-005 — scanner feedback (audio + haptic) lib/scanner/feedback.ts (06-a)
prompt:
# T-005 — scanner feedback (audio + haptic + visual hooks)

PRD: docs/prd/06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §6 D2, §8.1 FR-SC-FE-009
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Provide `playSuccess() | playError() | playWarn() | playCritical()` using Web Audio API + Vibration API + visual callback dispatch, with on/off config persisted in localStorage.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/scanner/src/lib/scanner/feedback.ts`:
   - Lazy AudioContext singleton (created on first call to keep iOS autoplay rules happy).
   - Frequencies/durations exactly per §6 D2 (success 800Hz/500ms, error 400Hz/200ms×2, warn 600Hz/300ms, critical short×3).
   - Vibration patterns exactly per §6 D2.
   - LocalStorage keys `scanner.feedback.beep` / `.vibration` (default true).
   - Visual callback dispatched via a `FeedbackBus` event emitter (subscribers attach in components later).
2. Vitest with WebAudio + navigator.vibrate mocks.

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/lib/scanner/feedback.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/lib/scanner/feedback-bus.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/feedback.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given localStorage has scanner.feedback.beep=false, when playSuccess runs, then no AudioContext.createOscillator call is made
2. Given navigator.vibrate is mocked, when playError runs with vibration enabled, then vibrate is called with pattern [100,100]
3. Given a subscriber attached to FeedbackBus 'success', when playSuccess runs, then the subscriber is invoked with payload { type: 'success' }

## Test strategy
- RED: write feedback.test.ts asserting all three ACs with mocked AudioContext + vibrate before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test feedback'

## Risk red lines
- Do not create AudioContext at module load (must be lazy on first user gesture)
- Do not crash if Web Audio API is unavailable (graceful no-op)
- Do not store user PIN or other secrets in localStorage

pipeline_inputs.description: Audio + haptic + visual feedback bus with localStorage on/off config; lazy AudioContext for iOS autoplay rules.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Create apps/scanner/src/lib/scanner/feedback.ts + feedback-bus.ts. Lazy AudioContext, exact §6 D2 freq/duration/vibration patterns, localStorage on/off keys, FeedbackBus event emitter subscribed by visual layers later. Vitest mocks AudioContext and navigator.vibrate to assert call patterns and on/off gating.

Wave0 scanner parity note: use `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/home.jsx:63-136` as prototype reference and include mobile viewport 390x844 screenshot + Playwright trace artifacts in closeout.
out_of_scope: Do not implement the visual flash component here (consumed via FeedbackBus by layout/ScanInput)
Do not write SCN-settings UI here (T-024)
Do not handle session timeout audio here
Do not implement P2 flows here: transfer-order (TO) creation, replenishment, cycle-count, inquiry full traceability — P1 stubs only
Do not implement offline queue write-path here (P2); P1 keeps offline-safe scan buffer + indicator only
acceptance_criteria: Given the scanner UI is implemented, when compared with `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/home.jsx:63-136`, then it preserves mobile structural parity, visual parity, and interaction parity for the screen/flow at viewport 390x844, captures screenshot and Playwright trace artifacts, and documents any intentional divergence from PRD/UX. Follow parity evidence requirements in `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
Given localStorage scanner.feedback.beep=false, when playSuccess runs, then AudioContext.createOscillator is not called
Given navigator.vibrate is mocked, when playError runs with vibration enabled, then vibrate is called with pattern [100,100]
Given a subscriber attached to FeedbackBus 'success', when playSuccess runs, then the subscriber is invoked with payload { type: 'success' }
test_strategy: RED: write feedback.test.ts mocking AudioContext + vibrate asserting on/off gating + bus dispatch before implementation
For UI parity, capture 390x844 screenshots and Playwright trace/video artifacts; attach artifact paths in closeout per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
risk_red_lines: Do not create AudioContext at module load
Do not crash if Web Audio API is unavailable
Do not store secrets in localStorage
Do not bypass scanner.* permission namespace when wiring server actions
Do not regress operator-friendly touch targets (>=48dp) or mobile viewport 390x844 evidence
cross_module_dependencies: 02-settings: PIN policy, locale, scanner device defaults
